description: VIPSA environment machine status and command logs

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, status AS "Keithley 2450" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'keithley-2450' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, status AS "Keithley 707B" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'keithley-707b' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, status AS "Keysight B2902B" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'keysight-b2902b' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, status AS "Light" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'light' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, status AS "Stage" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'stage' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, status AS "Zaber" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'zaber' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'keithley-2450' AND time >= now() - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'keithley-707b' AND time >= now() - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'keysight-b2902b' AND time >= now() - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'light' AND time >= now() - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'stage' AND time >= now() - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'zaber' AND time >= now() - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

options.content: Open Manual Jog Panel

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, cpu AS "CPU" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'zaber' AND cpu IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, mem AS "Memory" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'zaber' AND mem IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Commands Sent" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'command' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('keithley-2450', 'keithley-707b', 'keysight-b2902b', 'light', 'stage', 'zaber')

SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Responses" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'response' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('keithley-2450', 'keithley-707b', 'keysight-b2902b', 'light', 'stage', 'zaber')

SELECT now() AS time, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 END) AS DOUBLE) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS "Success Rate" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'response' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('keithley-2450', 'keithley-707b', 'keysight-b2902b', 'light', 'stage', 'zaber')

SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Errors" FROM machine_commands WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('keithley-2450', 'keithley-707b', 'keysight-b2902b', 'light', 'stage', 'zaber')

SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', time, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00Z') AS time, COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'keithley-2450' THEN 1 END) AS "Keithley 2450", COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'keithley-707b' THEN 1 END) AS "Keithley 707B", COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'keysight-b2902b' THEN 1 END) AS "Keysight B2902B", COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'light' THEN 1 END) AS "Light", COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'stage' THEN 1 END) AS "Stage", COUNT(CASE WHEN machine_id = 'zaber' THEN 1 END) AS "Zaber" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'command' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('keithley-2450', 'keithley-707b', 'keysight-b2902b', 'light', 'stage', 'zaber') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', time, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00Z') AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Errors" FROM machine_commands WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('keithley-2450', 'keithley-707b', 'keysight-b2902b', 'light', 'stage', 'zaber') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT time, machine_id, msg_type, COALESCE(cmd_name, '') AS command, status, COALESCE(CAST(step_number AS VARCHAR), '') AS step, username, COALESCE(run_id, '') AS run_id, COALESCE(substr(response_message, 1, 300), '') AS message, COALESCE(substr(params_json, 1, 300), '') AS params, COALESCE(substr(data_json, 1, 1000), '') AS response FROM machine_commands WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN ('keithley-2450', 'keithley-707b', 'keysight-b2902b', 'light', 'stage', 'zaber') ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500

title: VIPSA
